T

TablePile - Class in com.trifasico.x50zo.model
Represents the central pile of played cards on the table in a Cincuentazo game.
TablePile() - Constructor for class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.TablePile
Constructs an empty TablePile with a sum of zero.
tableSum() - Method in record class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.GameState
Returns the current table sum that the next card played must not push above 50.
TEN - Enum constant in enum class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Rank
 
THINKING_MILLIS - Static variable in class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.MachinePlayThread
Milliseconds the thread sleeps before executing the machine's play.
THINKING_MILLIS - Static variable in class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.MachineThinkingTask
Milliseconds the task sleeps before executing the machine's play.
THREE - Enum constant in enum class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Rank
 
toString() - Method in record class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Card
Returns a concise log-friendly representation such as "A-hearts" or "10-spades".
toString() - Method in record class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.GameState
Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.PlayerAdapter
Returns a log-friendly summary of this player's current hand.
toString() - Method in enum class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Rank
TurnManager - Class in com.trifasico.x50zo.model
Central coordinator for a Cincuentazo game session.
